requirements: The Bakery Management System should help bakery staff efficiently manage daily operations such as product catalog management, customer order processing, inventory tracking of raw materials, billing and payments, and customer information. The system should also generate sales reports, manage suppliers and employees, and provide alerts for low stock or pending orders to ensure smooth and organized bakery operations.

user_stories.title: Manage Product Catalog
user_stories.goal: Add, edit, and delete bakery products in the system
user_stories.benefit: Allows for accurate and up-to-date product information
acceptance_criteria: As a bakery staff member, I can add a new product to the catalog with all necessary details
As a bakery staff member, I can edit an existing product's details
As a bakery staff member, I can delete a product from the catalog

user_stories.title: Process Customer Orders
user_stories.goal: Create, update, and complete customer orders
user_stories.benefit: Streamlines the order processing and fulfillment process
acceptance_criteria: As a bakery staff member, I can create a new customer order with all necessary details
As a bakery staff member, I can update an existing customer order
As a bakery staff member, I can mark an order as completed

user_stories.title: Track Inventory of Raw Materials
user_stories.goal: Monitor and manage inventory levels of raw materials
acceptance_criteria: As a bakery staff member, I can view the current inventory levels of raw materials
As a bakery staff member, I can receive alerts when inventory levels reach a certain threshold

user_stories.title: Generate Sales Reports
user_stories.goal: Generate daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports
user_stories.benefit: Provides valuable insights into sales trends and performance
acceptance_criteria: As a bakery manager, I can generate a daily sales report
As a bakery manager, I can generate a weekly sales report
As a bakery manager, I can generate a monthly sales report

user_stories.title: Manage Suppliers and Employees
user_stories.goal: Add, edit, and delete supplier and employee information
user_stories.benefit: Maintains accurate and up-to-date information for suppliers and employees
acceptance_criteria: As a bakery manager, I can add a new supplier to the system
As a bakery manager, I can edit an existing supplier's information
As a bakery manager, I can delete a supplier from the system
As a bakery manager, I can add a new employee to the system
As a bakery manager, I can edit an existing employee's information
As a bakery manager, I can delete an employee from the system
